# Membership Tiers

Acme Shop's Loyalty Program consists of three membership tiers: Silver, Gold, and Platinum, each offering a distinct set of benefits based on annual spending. Members start at the Silver tier after spending $500 in a year, receiving a 5% discount and early access to sales. To reach the Gold tier, an annual spend of $2,000 is required, providing a 10% discount, free standard shipping, and priority customer service. The highest tier, Platinum, requires spending $5,000 annually and grants a 15% discount, free express shipping, VIP event access, and a personal shopping assistant. Memberships are reviewed yearly, and members may be downgraded based on their spending.

[Source: loyalty_program.md#membership-tiers]
